project.name: <PROJECT_NAME>
project.description: <one-line description of the project the harness runs against>

implementer.note: Role FALLBACK + fix-loop coder (available, 88.6% SWE-bench Verified). The implement STAGE is overridden to claude-fable-5 via routing.stageModels (top agentic coder, 95.0%); remove that entry if Fable is unavailable and implement falls back to this role.

reviewer.note: Role FALLBACK; cheapest of the set. Actual per-stage reviewers come from routing.stageModels (breadth=Opus for code-review strength, depth=Gemini for abstract multi-hop).

arbiter.note: Feedback model: lowest hallucination of the set (4.2% w/ thinking) for calibrated, non-anchoring adjudication. Used when routing.stageModels.feedback is unset.

graph.pluginRoot: <absolute path to a local Understand-Anything plugin checkout, or leave blank>

evolve.description: Meta-loop for iterative refinement of harness routing guidance based on experiment scoring

traceGrading.description: Deterministic trajectory scoring for convergence loops and workflow metrics

otel.description: OpenTelemetry trace export for observability dashboard

independentSecurityReview.description: SAW 'never self-review' — the stage owning the security/QA gate must be a different model from the implementer. Enforced by prompt-router securityGateSeparationErrors; set enabled=false to opt out.

taskClassMatrix.description: Review-only prompts route to the review profile.
taskClassMatrix.reason: Matched review-centric language; route to the independent review chain.

taskClassMatrix.description: Mechanical, bounded tasks use the deterministic model set.
taskClassMatrix.reason: Matched deterministic/mechanical task signals; using the deterministic model set.

taskClassMatrix.description: Default path for ambiguous or architecture-heavy work.

feature.description: Full feature delivery through the complete stage machine.

feature-deterministic.description: Full feature delivery for deterministic/mechanical tasks.

review.description: Independent review path without an implementation handoff.

simplifyDebt.description: Convention for marking a deliberately minimal/expedient implementation (anti-over-engineering doctrine) with `// simplify-debt: <reason>` so the shortcut stays discoverable. Run `npm run harness:simplify-debt` to list open items; report-only, not a gate.

notify.description: Provider-agnostic harness notification sink (Proposal A). Fires a user-configured command on run state transitions; disabled by default. `command` is argv (array, recommended) or a string; spawned with shell:false. Placeholders {loop} {state} {kind} {metric} {journal} {payload} {webhook} substitute into argv elements; $VAR/${VAR} expand from env. argv[0] must be in allowedExecutables.

schedule.description: Portable 'run without you' — deterministic, unattended harness maintenance on a cron. Model-agnostic (no LLM, no secrets, no network): only Node built-ins and the harness's own self-tests. Runs in CI via .github/workflows/harness-maintenance.yml and locally via `npm run harness:maintenance`. Each task is { name, run, required, description }; the run fails only when a required task fails, so optional/environment-dependent checks stay informational.

tasks.name: selftest
tasks.description: Full harness self-test regression gate (all suites).
